expected_behavior: A long conversational episode (~90 min) with no creator-supplied chapters. Same class as case-01 but longer-form: more atoms means the default stub clamp (atoms/50, max 12) saturates at the upper bound, exercising the higher-FM-cost branch of the labelling phase. Pre-au2v.1: chapter prior absent. Post-au2v.1: plan emitted with 12 inferred boundary segments.
synthesis_notes: Atom density modeled on a long-form interview that consistently misses pipeline_coverage_limited classification on the diagnostic corpus (atoms/50 = 12 → upper clamp). Synthetic; no transcript text, no commercial-message attribution.
